#  Delete a Specification Area 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Ensure to delete the specification section revisions before deleting a specification area. See [Delete Specification Section Revisions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/delete-spec-section-revisions).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Locate the specification area you want to delete.
  3. Click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon.  

![Delete Edit Area](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1zZ0ZLOcd7AGu9ZQ9IJx0W/9a3cd239d0f4652c7e5d459a49d6e164/del.png?fm=webp)
  4. Click **Delete** and confirm.  
_Note:_ The delete action is only available if there are no specifications in the specification area.   



## See Also
  * [Enable or Disable Specification Areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-specification-areas)
  * [Specifications - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-specifications)
title: Delete a Specification Area
description: How to delete a specification area in the project's Specifications tool.
